sglang.title: [diffusion] feat: support efficient sequence shard
sglang.author: nono-Sang
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

For video models, when SGLang enables SP (Sequence Parallelism), it uses frame-level partitioning. The number of frames needs to be adjusted to meet the divisibility condition, and the number of padding tokens is pad_frames * latent_H * latent_W. However, we can directly partition along

sglang.title: Fix TRT-LLM MLA backend applying k_scale to BF16 KV cache in BMM1
sglang.author: debo3
sglang.bodyExcerpt: When a model checkpoint contains KV cache scaling factors (k_scale/v_scale) but the KV cache dtype is BF16 (not FP8), the TRT-LLM MLA backend unconditionally applies k_scale in the BMM1 attention score computation. This is incorrect because k_scale is a quantization compensation factor that should o

sglang.title: Add tensor parallelism support to LFM2 ShortConv layers
sglang.author: tugot17
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
I just realised that the LFM models do not support the the tensor parallelsim. This is because we used the nn.Linear for in/out projections in ShortConv
This PR fixes this.
Changes

Use MergedColumnParallelLinear for in_proj to shard B, C, x projections separately.
Use RowParallelLinear with input_i

By migrating the Mooncake transfer engine from the disaggregation module to the distributed module, various advanced features such as PD, HiCache, and EPD can reuse the same transfer engine instance, instead of initializing and using different instances in different modu

sglang.title: [BugFix][PD]Fix metadata_buffer_index leak when aborted in PD
sglang.author: ZhengWG
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
In PD mode, when requests are aborted via abort_request(), the metadata_buffer_index allocated in pop_bootstrapped() is not freed, causing a memory leak. This happens when requests in the waiting_queue have already been allocated a metadata_buffer_index but are aborted before entering the

sglang.title: fix: use --no-build-isolation for human-eval install
sglang.author: harvenstar
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary

setuptools>=81 removed pkg_resources, causing pip install -e . to fail for human-eval in isolated build env
Add --no-build-isolation to skip isolated build env and use system setuptools

Fixes https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/actions/runs/21799185200/job/62898578639?pr=18273

sglang.title: [DLLM] Add JointThreshold algorithm for joint M2T and T2T decoding
sglang.author: edwardzjl
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
This PR introduces the JointThreshold algorithm, which enables the model to simultaneously fill in masks and refine previously generated tokens in a single iterative loop.
Modifications
Added JointThreshold Algorithm: Implemented a new DLLM algorithm that supports both Mask-to-Token (M2T)

vllm.title: Add embedding input functionality for disabled modalities [remake]
vllm.author: reaganjlee
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Cleaner remake of #31506.
Purpose
Resolves part of #21943. Previously, a change was made to implicitly make a model language-model only (#22299) when all modalities had limits set to 0. However, some users may want to input embeddings as an input while still saving on memory from the unused encoder.

vllm.title: [BugFix] Change support no act and mul for marlin
vllm.author: TomerBN-Nvidia
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Enable _supports_no_act_and_mul for Marlin MoE experts.
The Marlin fused MoE kernel already supports the no-act-and-mul path, but the _supports_no_act_and_mul() flag in MarlinExpertsBase was set to False. This PR flips it to True to reflect the existing support.


 Essential Elements of an E

vllm.title: [torch.compile] Add an option to force-enable the MOE cold start optimization
vllm.author: zou3519
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Previously when speculative decoding was enabled, we would force disable the MOE cold start optimization. I have some spec decoding models where I'm sure the optimization applies, so I wanted a flag to force-enable this.
This does not change the default behavior: the default behavior is still "on du

vllm.title: glm 4.6 fused tuned inference config for B200
vllm.author: navmarri14
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR adds a tuned fused MoE kernel configuration for the GLM-4.6 MoE architecture on NVIDIA B200 GPUs using FP8 quantization.
Specifically, it targets the configuration:
Experts (E): 160
Sharded size N=384 for TP=4
Device: NVIDIA B200
Dtype: fp8_w8a8
Previously, vLLM lacked a static configuration

vllm.title: Add support for ModelOpt MXFP8 dense models
vllm.author: danisereb
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Add support for ModelOpt MXFP8 dense models.
No support for MoE yet.
Related PRs
NVIDIA/Model-Optimizer#736
Test Plan
Use this LLM model (BF16):
https://huggingface.co/nvidia/OpenMath2-Llama3.1-8B
Convert the model to MXFP8 using ModelOpt:
export MODEL_PATH=/my_home/hf_models/nvidia/OpenMath

vllm.title: [BugFix] Fix `fastsafetensors` TP all procs using all GPUs
vllm.author: njhill
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Currently when used with multi-GPU deployments, fastsafetensors will result in all worker processes initializing a cuda context on all devices, resulting in a significant amount of wasted GPU memory (~ 680MB * (world_size - 1)) per GPU.

This can be avoided with both of:

Disabling GDS mode for dist
